title: Human Activity Recognition System Based on Hybrid Model
description: Master's thesis focused on developing a comprehensive hybrid deep learning model for real-time human activity recognition. Integrates multiple neural network architectures for enhanced accuracy.
institution: Southwest University of Science and Technology

title: YOLOv7-Based Surgical Tool Localization
description: Bachelor's thesis implementing advanced YOLO variants for detecting and localizing surgical instruments in laparoscopic videos. Achieved real-time processing on edge devices.
institution: Southwest University of Science and Technology

title: AI in Robotics - Motion Planning
description: Developed intelligent motion planning algorithms for autonomous robots using deep reinforcement learning and computer vision for real-world navigation.

title: Person Re-Identification System
description: Multi-task deep learning model with attribute-specific heads for person re-identification across different camera views with high accuracy.

title: Speech Recognition Pipeline
description: End-to-end speech recognition system combining signal processing with deep neural networks for real-time audio transcription.

title: Medical Image Analysis Framework
description: Comprehensive framework for medical image processing and analysis using advanced computer vision techniques for disease detection.

title: Edge AI Deployment System
description: Optimized deep learning model deployment on IoT devices and edge computing platforms for real-time inference.

title: Hybrid Intelligence System
description: Research on combining symbolic AI with deep learning to create hybrid systems that mirror human cognition patterns.

title: AI Ethics Framework
description: Developing frameworks for ethical AI systems addressing structural bias, fairness, and epistemic injustice in machine learning.

title: Brain-Computer Interface
description: Research on connecting neural signals with computational systems for advanced human-computer interaction and rehabilitation applications.
